calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition For Order Of Relief From Provisions Of Gov. Code 945.4 Or Otherwise Accepting Claim As Timely
Off Calendar Mar-04-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Travis Smith, Esq. (415.671.4628 x103; tsmith@grosskleinlaw.com) of Gross & Klein LLP for Petitioner.
Kaitlyn Murphy, Esq. (415.554.3867; kaitlyn.murphy@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Respondent.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SEAN CROSS' Petition For Order Of Relief From Provisions Of Gov. Code 945.4 Or Otherwise Accepting Claim As Timely is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

*** ORDER DENYING PETITIONER SEAN CROSS'S PETITION FOR LATE CLAIM RELIEF signed after hearing. ***
